columns.name: kornHandler
columns.description: Primary key for the KornHandler record

columns.name: navn
columns.description: Name of the kornhandler

columns.name: adresse
columns.description: Address of the kornhandler

columns.name: postnr
columns.description: Postal code of the kornhandler

columns.name: aktiv
columns.description: Indicates if the kornhandler is active

columns.name: telefonnr
columns.description: Phone number of the kornhandler

columns.name: organisasjonsnr
columns.description: Organizational number of the kornhandler

columns.name: kontoNr
columns.description: Account number associated with the kornhandler

columns.name: renteDgr
columns.description: Number of days for interest rate calculation

columns.name: renteSats
columns.description: Interest rate percentage

columns.name: gebyrBel
columns.description: Fee amount for direct payment

columns.name: minUtbetBel
columns.description: Minimum payment amount

columns.name: utbforsinkDgr
columns.description: Number of overdue days for payment calculation

columns.name: remType
columns.description: Type of remittance

columns.name: morarenteDgr
columns.description: Number of days for maturity interest calculation

columns.name: morarenteSats
columns.description: Maturity interest rate percentage

columns.name: bilagsart
columns.description: Type of invoice

columns.name: maxTtProsSavare
columns.description: Maximum addition for SAVARE percentage in %

columns.name: kRntftSavare
columns.description: Credit interest rate for SAVARE after 1/10

columns.name: kRntftUtsSavare
columns.description: Credit interest rate for SAAFRO from 1/10 to settlement date

columns.name: dRntftSakorn
columns.description: Debit interest rate for SAKORN on funding

columns.name: dRntftSafro
columns.description: Debit interest rate for SAARFO on funding

columns.name: nOppgjDatoSakoV
columns.description: Normal settlement date for SAKORN

columns.name: nOppgjDatoFro
columns.description: Normal settlement date for SAAAFRO

columns.name: maxFremKjUtsaed
columns.description: Maximum number of foreign wheat kernels in UTS exceedance

columns.name: maxFremKjSakorn
columns.description: Maximum number of foreign wheat kernels in SAKORN

columns.name: brukerId
columns.description: User ID associated with the kornhandler record

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: Timestamp of the record

columns.name: knrPnr
columns.description: Product number for the kornhandler
